title: Tangy Silky Festive French Egg Stir-fry
description: A vegan-friendly festive dish featuring eggs stir-fried with tangy and silky flavors to bring a touch of winter cheer.

ingredients.name: 3 tablespoons soy sauce (or tamari for a gluten-free option)

instructions: Preheat your wok or non-stick skillet over medium-high heat.
In a small bowl, mix together lemon juice, soy sauce, white vinegar, honey/maple syrup, and black pepper. Add garlic powder to taste; set aside.
Beat the eggs in another bowl until well combined. If using tofu for protein, crumble 4 oz of firm tofu into the egg mixture.
Add olive oil to your heated wok or skillet and heat until shimmering. Pour in beaten eggs and stir-fry for about 1 minute or until set but not fully cooked.
Toss in red bell pepper slices and onion chunks, continuing to stir-fry for an additional minute or until vegetables are tender-crisp.
Pour in the lemon-sauce mixture and bring to a simmer. Allow it to bubble gently for another minute, stirring occasionally.
Remove from heat and serve hot with steamed rice or as a side dish.
